cash_app.name: Cash App

voice.tone: Confident, direct, culturally fluent. Speaks like a friend who knows money.
voice.personality: Bold, accessible, real. Not corporate or preachy.
voice.audience: Everyday people, younger demographics, underbanked, bitcoin-curious

writing_rules: Lead with what customers can DO, not what the product IS
Use 'you' and 'your' - speak directly to the reader
Short sentences. Punchy. Get to the point.
Bitcoin is money to use, not just an asset to hold
Avoid financial jargon - use everyday language
Numbers are specific (e.g., '97% repayment rate' not 'high repayment')
Features serve real life moments - connect to daily use cases
example_headlines: Cash App is built for living on bitcoin
Cash App makes living on bitcoin simple
Introducing Cash App Releases: See What's New
Cash App Brings Piece of The Moment Universe to Life
example_copy: We're building the tools that make it easier to live on bitcoin every day.
Bitcoin works when it moves easily, when people can rely on it day to day.
Keep the feedback coming. It's how we build better for you.
The way people earn and manage money has fundamentally shifted, and traditional financial institutions haven't kept up.

square.name: Square

voice.tone: Warm, professional, seller-focused. Understands the hustle.
voice.personality: Supportive partner, not a vendor. Celebrates local business.
voice.audience: Small business owners, entrepreneurs, local sellers, franchises

writing_rules: Sellers are heroes - celebrate their success
Focus on outcomes: more sales, saved time, happy customers
Use 'sellers' not 'merchants' or 'SMBs'
Local businesses = neighborhood favorites
Technology enables, it doesn't replace the human touch
Specific use cases > abstract benefits
example_headlines: Square helps businesses turn transactions into connections
Second Generation Square Register Delivers More Speed, Power, and Reliability
7 Leaves Cafe Plans Expansion, Chooses Square as its Commerce Technology Partner
example_copy: Square helps businesses turn transactions into connections and businesses into neighborhood favorites.
Whether independently run or a global chain, Square understands that sellers succeed when they have the freedom to focus on the experiences that keep customers coming back.
San Francisco's economy is powered by local businesses, and this weekend brings an incredible opportunity to put them front and center.

block.name: Block

voice.tone: Confident, forward-looking, purposeful. Speaks to vision and impact.
voice.personality: Builder mindset. Ambitious but grounded in results.

writing_rules: Lead with impact and scale
Connect products to broader purpose: economic empowerment
Data-driven claims with specific numbers
Ecosystem thinking - show how brands work together
Honest about challenges, confident about direction
Global perspective, inclusive language
phrases_to_use: financial system that is open to everyone
unlocks different aspects of the economy
example_headlines: Block, Inc. Surpasses $200 Billion in Credit Provided to Customers
Block Achieves 'B' Grade in 2025 CDP Climate Assessment
Block's New Phoenix Office Will Serve As A Hub for Sellers and Local Teams
example_copy: Block, Inc. builds technology to increase access to the global economy.
Through this work, Block is proving that with the right technology, inclusive lending and responsible risk management aren't opposing forces.
Each of our brands unlocks different aspects of the economy for more people.

tidal.name: Tidal

voice.tone: Playful, casual, raw, authentic. Music fan talking to music fans.
voice.audience: Music lovers, artists, audiophiles, culture enthusiasts

writing_rules: Write like you talk - casual, real
Center on music, always
Reference lyrics when natural
Use music terminology authentically
Skip corporate speak entirely
Celebrate real moments and genuine reactions
Feel free to break grammar rules for effect
example_copy: anyone else got this on repeat?
the keys on this track tho...
name a better collab. we'll wait.
friday mood: this album on max volume

afterpay.name: Afterpay

voice.tone: Friendly, empowering, responsible. Makes spending feel smart.
voice.personality: Helpful guide, not pushy. Celebrates smart shopping.

writing_rules: Focus on flexibility and control
Responsible spending, not reckless
Simple explanations of how it works
Connect to real shopping moments
Transparency about terms
example_copy: Afterpay is transforming the way customers manage their spending over time.
Shop now, pay later - on your terms.
